title: KML

name: data-gov-uk-combined-authorities-may-2025-boundaries-en-bfc
notes: This file contains the digital vector boundaries for Combined Authorities, in England, as at May 2025. The boundaries available are: (BFC) Full resolution - clipped to the coastline (Mean High Water mark). Contains both Ordnance Survey and ONS Intellectual Property Rights. REST URL of Feature Access Service – https://services1.arcgis.com/ESMARspQHYMw9BZ9/ar…
